tests.name: schema requires route and decision
tests.expected: Schema requires route, decision owner, decision time, demo surface, visible source label, and fallback route.

tests.name: schema requires core evidence identifiers
tests.expected: Schema requires project_id, run_id, before artifact path, after artifact path, and verify artifact path.

tests.name: schema requires badge downgrade paths
tests.expected: Schema requires truth badge rows with planned badge, evidence field, and downgrade label.

tests.name: schema keeps timing conservative
tests.expected: Schema keeps three_minute_timing_pass false and requires exactly three timing rows.

tests.name: schema does not claim live evidence
tests.expected: Schema is documented as structural validation only; artifact paths still need human review.
